caption: A man wearing a light gray polo shirt, dark pants, and a black face mask exits a large white team bus. The bus features a blue top, the Real Madrid crest, and various sponsor logos, including "Audi" and "codere". In the background, a large building with vertical architectural details stands under a clear blue sky, and other individuals in uniforms, including one wearing a bright yellow safety vest, are visible. As the sequence progresses, the man steps down from the bus and walks away from the vehicle toward the left. Simultaneously, another individual wearing a black shirt and a red backpack is seen stepping out of the bus behind him. The scene takes place on a paved asphalt area, with a red traffic cone and a red sign visible in the distance.
